title: ALASKA SUPERIOR COURT RULING SIDES WITH AFN AND PROTECTS THE PCE FUND
summary: AFN applauds Alaska Superior Court Judge Josie Garton’s ruling on August 10 that the state must fund the Power Cost Equalization (PCE) Fund, a key program that keeps rural electricity costs on par with urban areas of the state. “We are pleased that Judge Garton agreed with AFN that the PCE is not su...
